spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && buffer_id >= 0 && buffer_id < galloc->n_buffers && valid_range(galloc->buffers, 0, galloc->n_buffers)
spec.postcondition: (ensures result == 0 || result > 0) && (result == (galloc->buffers[buffer_id] == NULL ? 0 : (exists i in 0..buffer_id such that galloc->buffers[i] == galloc->buffers[buffer_id] ? 0 : ggml_vbuffer_size(galloc->buffers[buffer_id]))))

ggml_vbuffer_size.precondition: requires valid(buf) && valid(buf->chunks) && forall i in [0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS): (buf->chunks[i] == NULL || valid(buf->chunks[i])) && (buf->chunks[i] != NULL implies ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[i]) >= 0 && ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[i]) <= SIZE_MAX) && (no integer overflow when summing all chunk sizes)
ggml_vbuffer_size.postcondition: ensures result >= 0 && result == sum of ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[i]) for all i where buf->chunks[i] != NULL && result <= SIZE_MAX && (no overflow occurred in computing result)
